defect: unsealed joints (no mastic/foil tape - cloth duct tape is the classic wrong answer, great ID item)
prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Duct installation, part of the HVAC-R scope. The observed field condition is: unsealed joints (no mastic/foil tape - cloth duct tape is the classic wrong answer, great ID item). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: IMC 603, SMACNA, Manual D.
title: Compliance check: Duct installation (commercial project)
